blocks.name: LOWER BODY DROP SET
blocks.notes:
Front squat 8 reps @ heavy loads
rest 10s
Heel elevated back squat x AMRAP
rest 10s
Back squat x AMRAP
- 2-4 x Working sets (pick based on how you feel)
- Using a tempo of 3,0,1,0
- All sets performed at same weight as front squat
- Take as many warm up sets as you need
- AMRAP = as many unbroken reps as possible
- Rest 3-4 mins between sets
The idea of a mechanical drop set is to start with the hardest exercise and perform 8 reps @ a heavy %, then to prolong the set we make the exercise easier, instead of making the weight lighter.
Tempo = 3s down (eccentric)

Perform 6 reps, rest 15-20s, perform 4 reps
rest 2-3 mins x 2 sets.

- Tempo 3010

blocks.name: WIDE GRIP BARBELL ROW

- 3 Working sets

60s on 60s off x 3 sets
- In 60s perform as many reps as possible
- Keep quality reps

days.label: PHASE 3 REST PAUSE 6+4
warmup: complete 3 rounds in a continuous fashion
Adductor rock backs x10 each side
Front foot elevated ankle glides x10 each side

blocks.name: BACK SQUAT
blocks.notes:
Build to 75%
2 sets x 6 reps @ 75%
rest 2-3 mins between sets
Then 2 x rest pause sets
2 x 6 + 4 reps
rest 2-3 mins between sets
REST PAUSE SETS ARE AS FOLLOWS;
Perform 6 reps, rest 15-20s, perform 4 reps @ 75%
rest 2-3 mins x 2 sets.
This technique is very demanding, so stick to the correct percentages, if you feel tired on a certain day then drop the percentages slightly.
- Tempo 3010

blocks.name: BULGARIAN SPLIT SQUAT
blocks.notes:
Build to a weight you can do for 6 to 7 reps
2 sets x 6 reps each leg
rest 2-3 mins between sets
Then 2 x rest pause sets
2 x 6 + 4 reps each leg
rest 2-3 mins between sets
REST PAUSE SETS ARE AS FOLLOWS;
Perform 6 reps, rest 15-20s, perform 4 reps @ same weight as above
rest 2-3 mins x 2 sets.
This technique is very demanding, so stick to the correct percentages, if you feel tired on a certain day then drop the percentages slightly.
- Tempo 4010

blocks.name: BACK RACK WALKING LUNGE
blocks.notes:
60s on 60s off x 3 sets
- Select a weight you can perform for 60s without stopping
- If you don't have room then reverse lunge is fine.
- Perform quality reps with control

blocks.name: MIDLINE
blocks.notes:
4 sets
Half kneeling landmine rotation x 10 reps each way
Accentuated Abmat sit-up x 15 reps

blocks.name: 60 MIN AMRAP
blocks.notes:

50 cal assault bike
200 single skips
50 cal row
800m light jog

blocks.name: BICEPS
blocks.notes:
MECHANICAL DROP SET
Reverse grip bicep curl x 8 reps
rest 10s
DB bicep curl x AMRAP
rest 10s
DB hammer curl x AMRAP
- 2-4 x Working sets (pick based on how you feel)
- Using a tempo of 1,0,3,0
- All sets performed at same weight as front squat
- Take as many warm up sets as you need
- AMRAP = as many unbroken reps as possible
- Rest 3-4 mins between sets
- Try to increase volume in AMRAP from last week
The idea of a mechanical drop set is to start with the hardest exercise and perform 8 reps @ a heavy %, then to prolong the set we make the exercise easier, instead of making the weight lighter.
Tempo = 3s down (eccentric)

blocks.name: TRICEPS
blocks.notes:

- Take as many warm up sets as you need

The idea of a mechanical drop set is to start with the hardest exercise and perform 8 reps @ a heavy %, then to prolong the set we make the exercise easier, instead of making the weight lighter.
Tempo = 3s down (eccentric)

blocks.name: BICEPS
blocks.notes:
MECHANICAL DROP SET
Reverse grip bicep curl x 8 reps
rest 10s
DB bicep curl x AMRAP
rest 10s
DB hammer curl x AMRAP
- 2-4 x Working sets (pick based on how you feel)
- Using a tempo of 1,0,3,0
- All sets performed at same weight as front squat
- Take as many warm up sets as you need
- AMRAP = as many unbroken reps as possible
- Rest 3-4 mins between sets
- Try to increase volume in AMRAP from last week
The idea of a mechanical drop set is to start with the hardest exercise and perform 8 reps @ a heavy %, then to prolong the set we make the exercise easier, instead of making the weight lighter.
Tempo = 3s down (eccentric)
